docket_entries.description: JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON JAN-08-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT GILES, PAMELA ROSE
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-03-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206

DEPT 7/ JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY ARNOLD EVJE PRESENT FOR PLTF. DEFT PAMELA GILES, IN PRO=PER DOES NOT APPEAR. PLTF PRESENTS PRIMA FACIE CASE. COURT ORDERS JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AND AGAINST DEFT. PLTF SUBMITTED PREPARED JUDGMNT. EXHIBITS W/DRAWN AND RETURNED TO PLTF.
